strategies: Use Manrope in font-black or font-extrabold with tracking-tight for marketing headings.
Use IBM Plex Sans for dashboard data and body text for optimal numerical legibility.
Use JetBrains Mono tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines, labels, and tracking IDs.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B (High Density Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Mode A (The Tetris Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 or gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for breathing room. Dashboard cards should have p-6.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and tabular data. Align buttons to container flow.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat Solid. 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-white/80 or bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, backdrop-saturate-150, 1px bottom border. MUST NOT be completely transparent if content scrolls under.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.marketing_hero: Dark Industrial look. Dark overlay with high-contrast text and vibrant tracking search input.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.status_badges: Neumorphic / Pill-shaped. Sharp inner contrast, subtle background tint matching the status color.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change text color and background on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific transition properties, NEVER 'transition: all'. (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).
motion_and_interactions.micro_animations: Staggered entrance for shipment history timeline lists. Pulse effect for 'In Transit' or 'Out for Delivery' status dots.

components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Tables for shipment management and history. High density, clear row separation.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select for Shipment Creation. Use Select (not native <select>).
components_strategy.tracking_timeline: Custom HTML/Tailwind vertical stepper/timeline using relative positioning, absolute borders for the connecting line.

creative_enhancers.landing_page_3d: Use react-globe.gl on the landing page hero or features section to visualize global shipping routes. Ensure background is transparent (rgba(0,0,0,0)).
creative_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture overlay over dark sections to prevent digital flatness.
creative_enhancers.data_viz: Recharts / Shadcn charts for Admin analytics (shipments per day, success rates).

images.description: Large container ship across the open sea, ideal for global logistics landing page.
Delivery worker van logistics, suitable for Driver App feature section.
Large warehouse filled with shelves for storage/enterprise solutions feature.
Forklift driving through pallets, good for about us or services.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='track-shipment-button'). Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use high contrast, asymmetrical elements, and crisp borders.
Avoid complete transparent backgrounds for headers/dropdowns. Always use blur and saturation or solid color.
Do not center-align the app container globally (no .App { text-align: center; }).
Never use AI assistant emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
Prioritize existing components from src/components/ui. Use named exports for components, default for pages.
For .js/.jsx extension files, do not use TypeScript specific syntax.
Implement real-time/mock tracking statuses dynamically with varying color codes based on status.
Never use generic placeholders. Use the provided image URLs.
Implement both dark and light themes (or a hybrid where marketing is dark/industrial and dashboard is high-contrast light).
